name: finance-app
description: Professional-grade desktop finance application for valuation modeling, stock screening, portfolio tracking, and company research.

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.package:full: npm run bundle-python && npm run package
scripts.release: npm run bundle-python && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --publish always
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.release:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --publish always
